prompt: Implement a pricing comparison page in our existing Next.js app and make it feel specific to our observability product
rationale: Production UI implementation with hierarchy, comparison, and visual-quality requirements

prompt: this dashboard works but it looks like generic ai slop, redesign it without losing density
rationale: Explicit interface redesign and density work

prompt: Create the empty, loading, error, and success states for our project list
rationale: UX state design for a product surface

prompt: Audit this checkout screenshot for hierarchy, usability, mobile behavior, and accessibility
rationale: Design and UX critique

prompt: Build a keyboard-first command palette component that matches the components already in src/ui
rationale: UI component design and repository implementation

prompt: Make this existing modal keyboard-accessible: focus is not contained, the close icon has no name, and focus is lost when it closes
rationale: Accessibility remediation requiring interaction design judgment

prompt: Our settings page is a wall of fields. Rework the information architecture and implement the new layout
rationale: UX structure plus UI implementation

prompt: Design a responsive navigation system for a documentation site with four product areas
rationale: Navigation, responsive layout, and information architecture

prompt: Make this React form easier to complete and improve its visual hierarchy
rationale: Mixed UX and visual refinement

prompt: Set up a small reusable component and token system for this new frontend
rationale: Design-system creation

prompt: Should this startup sell to freelancers or enterprise security teams first?
rationale: Product and market strategy

prompt: The layout is final. Add a spring transition when this drawer opens and respect reduced motion
rationale: Motion-only implementation on a settled layout

prompt: After upgrading our dialog library, focus jumps to Safari's address bar when the modal closes. Reproduce it and find the root cause
rationale: A regression investigation requiring systematic debugging before design remediation

prompt: Wire the existing Button component's onClick prop to open the existing modal; do not change visuals or behavior
rationale: Mechanical frontend wiring with no interface design decision

prompt: Design the PostgreSQL schema for subscriptions and invoices
rationale: Database architecture

prompt: Profile this canvas animation and find why it drops frames
rationale: Animation performance debugging

prompt: Research whether small accounting firms will pay for automated reconciliation
rationale: Market evidence and product strategy

prompt: Review my pull request for correctness, security regressions, and missing tests
rationale: Code review rather than design critique

prompt: Convert this portrait to a four-color Game Boy sprite
rationale: Pixel-art generation

prompt: The approved responsive layout overflows by 12px only in Safari 18. Reproduce the browser-specific defect and explain which CSS rule causes it
rationale: Root-cause debugging of an isolated browser defect
